---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest SQL support, an API, or a capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What do you want to do that you can't today?**
Describe the use case, not just the feature.

**Proposed SQL / API**
If it's SQL, show an example query. If it's an API, sketch the call.

```sql
-- example
```

**Is this on the roadmap?**
Check [docs/product-roadmap.md](../docs/product-roadmap.md) — note the phase if
it fits one, or explain why it's new.

**Alternatives you've considered**
